title: Overview
text:
Say hello to your colleagues who want to know your name, pronouns, role, team and location (or if you're remote). 
         

             
         

             📄 Recent content that I've worked on 
         

             5 
         

             5 titles 
         

             🖐 Get in touch 
         

             ✉️  Insert your email here 
             💼  Insert your LinkedIn URL here 
         

             🔗  Insert your Twitter handle here 
             👤  Insert your Medium profile here 
         

             End with a bang! Some options are:  "I am so grateful to be here at  <Insert company name>  and very excited to get started!" or "Looking forward to meeting all of you!" or "Can't wait to get to know all of you!"

title: Getting started in Confluence
text:
0b885b7f-2b42-41b1-8a5e-f0dc5e91cb27 :Growth_purple: #EAE6FF 🌱 Welcome to Confluence! You can use Confluence to create a rich knowledge base or to collaborate with others using words, videos, images, graphics, charts, and graphs. This page walks you through some Confluence basics like spaces, pages, and elements that allow you to create and manage impactful content for your teams. Confluence 101 https://www.loom.com/share/5149671332234032989863f520d133ed 🗃️ Spaces 
 Spaces are where teams organize ideas, projects, and documentation. Spaces can be customized and integrated with both Atlassian tools and others. Spaces can be organized with  folders , and you can drag and drop to reorder or nest content so you can more effectively share your work with others. More about spaces 
 
 
 
 16 
 incomplete 
 Select + Create  at the top and choose  Space  to create a new space. 
 
 📄 Content types 
 Live docs  let you collaborate in realtime with your team for better ideas, faster decisions, and unified edits – all without needing to publish. 
 Pages  start as drafts that can be published into source-of-truth knowledge for your team — ideal for sharing policies, guides, and playbooks. 
 
 Whiteboards  are your team’s place to brainstorm, build connections, and make ideas come to life. 
 Databases  enable teams to build a library of information, track deliverables, and aggregate tools, links, and information from within and outside Confluence into a customizable view. 
 
 Smart links  allow users to integrate and display content from other tools and platforms directly within Confluence, enhancing productivity by centralizing information in one accessible location. 
 More about live docs  |  More about pages  |  More about whiteboards  |  More about databases  |  More about smart links 
 
 
 17 
 incomplete 
 Select  + Create  button  in the top navigation and choose content type to start creating content at any time. 
 
 Creating purposeful content 
 ✏️ Real—time editing You and up to 30 teammates can edit a page together - live - in real time. Changes save and sync automatically so that everyone editing sees the same thing. More about live editing 
 
 
 🧰 Elements Elements are tools like info panels, action items, and layouts, designed to help you make your pages more powerful. More about elements 
 
 
 
 2283 
 incomplete 
 Type /  to see a list of elements.  
 
 
  📏 Tables Tables allow you to organize important information on a page to discuss it with your team. Present the information the way it makes sense to you—resize columns, color cells, rows and columns, and sort the table by clicking the column headers. More about tables 
 
 
 
 2284 
 incomplete 
 Type /table  to add a table at any time. 
 
 
 📸 Header images and emojis Make your pages more visually impactful with header images and emojis. 🍕 Emojis aren’t just a fun way to spice up your page—they also show up in search, so using them strategically makes it easier to find pages later on. More about page header images 
 
 
 
 2285 
 incomplete 
 Hover over your page title and select  Add header image to customize your page. 
 
 
 💬 Comments and mentions Comments are a great way to start a conversation about a page or blog post. They allow you to remark on content, add important information, ask questions, and generally drive collaboration and teamwork. @mention a teammate to bring them into the conversation, and they can reply to and/or like comments. More about comments  |  More about mentions 
 
 
 
 25 
 incomplete 
 Highlight text and select  Comment  in the pop up menu to leave an inline comment. 
 
 What’s next? 
 These are the top three actions we think will help you get the most from Confluence. 
 
 32 
 incomplete 
 Explore a  Space 
 
 
 33 
 incomplete 
 Create  a page 
 
 
 34 
 incomplete 
 Invite  a teammate 
 
 
 
 
 Jira ❤️ Confluence Discover the integrations that help teams harness the combined powers of Jira and Confluence to ship projects faster. 
 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ohtDFXNAUns 
 Back to top ⤴

title: Explore Confluence Features
text:
Welcome to your trial,  ! You have until   to try all advanced features. With these features, you can bring clarity and control to your work. 2 2 false default list true 
 Get started with the top 3 most popular features 👇 Mission control   Purple premium Access workspace insights and controls all in one place. Try it now Learn More How teams use this feature: See who has access to your Confluence workspace Identify which spaces have the most inactive content Manage user permissions and content privacy settings Keep track of key workspace changes as users come and go and your company evolves Helpful resources: Act on insights from mission control Feature highlights Community page https://www.loom.com/share/4cdf4dc46cc3402d869bf0706ff24083?sid=f51c6a41-0d21-4299-b34e-7842620c0b8e Atlassian Intelligence   Purple premium Summarize pages, get writing help, and more. Learn More How teams use this feature: Draft, edit, translate content, improve writing, and change tone Summarize pages, page comments, and blogs Generate a summary or action items from a page Helpful resources: Get started with AI in Confluence AI features in Confluence Write or edit content https://www.loom.com/share/0ac11ad9b11147bdaa9f7553490fa68b?sid=24c426e9-5d2f-43db-a337-c511faaf48d8 Page permissions   Purple standard   Purple premium Control who can view, edit, and comment on pages. Learn More How teams use this feature: Choose who can view or edit specific pages Protect sensitive content Share draft work with only a few collaborators Lock down finalized documents to prevent changes Helpful resources: Manage permissions Understanding permissions Confluence permission structure https://www.loom.com/share/b89cca91df7d4d6e8ebd8e6a54f04192?sid=76e03ffe-6327-4d84-9d57-cf3207400558 
 Productivity & collaboration features Boost productivity and keep your team in sync with features designed to simplify collaboration and speed up work. Unlimited users   Purple standard   Purple premium Add anyone on your team, plus stakeholders. Learn More How teams use this feature: Add team members without worrying about hitting a cap Ensure that the right people at your company can see how work is progressing Helpful resources: How to invite your team Collaborate on content Public links   Purple standard   Purple premium Share a read-only page with anyone. Learn More How teams use this feature: Share read-only pages with contractors or stakeholders Publish product FAQs or documentation externally Reduce back-and-forth with support agents by making content self-serve Helpful resources: How to share with public links Public links settings Public links security Community page Team calendar   Purple premium Plan deadlines and time off across teams. Try it now Learn More How teams use this feature: Communicate availability and time off Create and customize recurring events See a birds-eye view of all time off across a team or company Link events to related pages Helpful resources: Get started with team calendars Feature highlights Team calendar FAQ Archive pages   Purple standard   Purple premium Archive outdated pages to keep page trees organized. Learn More How teams use this feature: Clean up outdated content without deleting it Reduce search clutter and improve page relevance Organize historical info for later reference Make space navigation easier Helpful resources: Archive content Page archiving Guest access   Purple standard   Purple premium Share projects and timelines with external clients. Try it now Learn More How teams use this feature: Invite clients, vendors, or contractors to collaborate securely, for free Limit access to only the spaces they need Enable cross-org collaboration without overhead Helpful resources: Invite guests What can guests see and do? Assign space access to guests Company hub   Purple premium Build a single source of truth for all company info. Try it now Learn More How teams use this feature: Centralize org-wide announcements and updates Provide easy access to company resources and policies Showcase culture and team highlights Create a single starting point for employees Helpful resources: Create a company hub Create a visually appealing hub Community page Unlimited whiteboards   Purple premium Brainstorm or create flows on an infinite canvas. Learn More How teams use this feature: Brainstorm ideas across teams without limits Visualize project plans and workflows Run team sessions, like brainstorming and planning, directly in Confluence Move from sticky notes to structured pages with AI Helpful resources: Confluence whiteboards Whiteboards plans and features Community page 10x more automations   Purple premium Automate time-consuming or repetitive tasks. Try it now Learn More How teams use this feature: Trigger reminders for stale content or review cycles Notify teams when a page is updated or published Reduce repetitive tasks for admins Scale automation with more monthly runs Helpful resources: Automations in action Confluence automations Create automation rules Eliminate manual tasks Bulk archive pages   Purple premium Clean up projects by archiving more than one at a time. Try it now Learn More How teams use this feature: Quickly clean up old project docs in one action Tidy up spaces at the end of a sprint or quarter Improve page discoverability Keep knowledge fresh without manual cleanup Helpful resources: Clean a space with content manager Archive a page 
 Admin control features Stay in control with advanced admin features that help you protect content and manage communication with ease. Announcement banner   Purple premium Send critical messages to your team. Try it now Learn More How teams use this feature: Broadcast company-wide updates at the top of every page Share reminders about upcoming changes or downtime Highlight important policy shifts or deadlines Get visibility without spamming inboxes Helpful resources: Post Confluence-wide announcements in a banner Admin key   Purple premium Diagnose problems and make changes on any page. Learn More How teams use this feature: Access restricted pages for troubleshooting Make urgent updates on protected content Reduce dependency on individual space admins Helpful resources: How to use admin key Bypass page restrictions Troubleshoot permissions fast Sandbox   Purple premium Test before making changes to your prod environment. Learn More How teams use this feature: Test changes before rolling them out live Train new users in a safe environment Preview new features or templates Validate permission settings and automation Helpful resources: Create a sandbox What are sandboxes? Test changes in a sandbox Release tracks   Purple premium Control when and how you release changes to users. Learn More How teams use this feature: Schedule when updates roll out to your site Give teams time to prepare for changes Stay in control of feature adoption Helpful resources: What are release tracks? 
 Storage & support features Scale confidently with storage that grows with you and support that’s always available. Unlimited storage   Purple premium Upload as many videos, images or files as you need. Learn More How teams use this feature: Upload images, files, and attachments without limits Centralize knowledge in one place Avoid spending time on file cleanup Helpful resources: How to manage your storage 24/7 premium support   Purple premium Get quick support directly from experts. Learn More How teams use this feature: Get help at any time from experts at Atlassian Resolve blockers fast with dedicated support Reduce reliance on internal admins Keep teams moving across time zones Helpful resources: Support services 99.9% SLA uptime   Purple premium Ensure your services remain reliable. Learn More How teams use this feature: Keep teams productive without interruptions Reduce downtime risks during high-impact work Helpful resources: SLA breakdowns 
 Security & compliance features Protect your data with advanced security and advanced admin controls, so your team can work confidently — no matter the scale. Space permissions   Purple standard   Purple premium Control who can view, edit, and comment on pages. Try it now Learn More How teams use this feature: Control who can access or contribute to entire spaces Give admin rights to space owners Limit viewing of internal or confidential team spaces Manage collaboration across departments Helpful resources: What are space permissions? Assign space permissions Copy space permissions   Purple premium Copy permissions from one space to another. Try it now Learn More How teams use this feature: Replicate permission structures for new spaces quickly Set up consistent access across similar project spaces Save time when onboarding new teams Reduce manual errors in permission management Helpful resources: What are copy space permissions? How to copy space permissions Inspect permissions   Purple premium Understand all active permissions for a specific user. Learn More How teams use this feature: Quickly troubleshoot why a user can or can’t access content Confirm content visibility before sharing Audit and clean up unnecessary access Helpful resources: How to inspect permissions IP allowlisting   Purple premium Limit your site access to trusted IP ranges. Learn More How teams use this feature: Limit Confluence access to company-managed networks Enforce security for remote or hybrid teams Protect sensitive data in high-compliance industries Add flexibility with exceptions for trusted IPs Helpful resources: Specify an IP address 
 Data & insights features Make informed decisions faster with built-in analytics that highlight engagement, track activity, and surface opportunities to improve. Page insights   Purple standard   Purple premium See engagement data, like page views. Try it now Learn More How teams use this feature: See who’s viewing or engaging with content (Premium) Understand how often pages are accessed Spot underused content or engagement drop-offs Prioritize updates based on traffic Helpful resources: Page insights Space analytics   Purple premium Track user activity, product usage, and security. Try it now Learn More How teams use this feature: Monitor site-wide activity and adoption Identify inactive users or spaces Track content creation trends Make informed decisions on cleanup or permissions Helpful resources: View Confluence analytics Watch how to use analytics and insights Audit logs   Purple standard   Purple premium View a list of all changes to your workspace. Try it now Learn More How teams use this feature: Review changes to permissions, settings, and content Track who made key updates for compliance Investigate incidents quickly Maintain a clear record of admin actions Helpful resources: View the audit log Content manager   Purple premium Oversee and manage all your content in one place. Try it now Learn More How teams use this feature: Get a centralized view of all content Filter and find outdated or underused pages Take bulk actions like archive, delete, or update Keep spaces clean and well-organized Helpful resources: Manage content at scale How to use content manager 
 Ready to take the next step? To choose the best plan for your team, simply click the trial button located in the top navigation. 
 Trial FAQ Why am I on a trial? When you signed up for Confluence, you were automatically given thirty days to try all paid features — absolutely free. At the end of your trial, you can choose a plan or downgrade to the Free plan. Where can I add payment? Error parsing storage content: 'You can add payment by clicking the trial button located in the top navigation, or by navigating to Billing & Manage Subscriptions in Admin Hub.' Where can I see different plan options? You can view all plans, features, and pricing structures on the  Confluence page on the Atlassian website . How long is my trial? Error parsing storage content: 'Your trial is 30 days. You can see how long you have left in your trial in Admin Hub or by navigating to Billing & Manage Subscriptions.' What happens when my trial is over? If you don’t take action, your account will either be downgraded to the Free plan automatically or deactivated. If you have less than 10 users, you’ll be downgraded. If you have more than 10 users, you’ll be deactivated. We recommend upgrading to Standard or Premium if you have more than 10 users, since the Free plan limit is 10 users. How do I extend my trial? To have your cloud trial extended, please contact our Customer Advocate team with your site URL and we’d be happy to assist. New trial licenses can be generated within  my.atlassian.com . After logging in, select New Trial License, followed by the product you’d like to try. Please note, you’ll need your Server ID to generate a trial license key. How do trials work across products? Each Atlassian product (like Jira or Confluence) has its own trial. You can manage them separately or upgrade multiple products at once from your billing settings. Error parsing storage content: 'You can get to billing settings by navigating to Billing & Manage Subscriptions in the Admin Hub.' #EAE6FF Is this guide useful? Want something different? Give us feedback  here

 Describe the problem and its impact. Include the hypothesis that's driving your work ("We think X will do Y, and we'll know we've succeeded if Z").

title: Automation Testing Framework Design Document Overview and Capabilities
text: Automation Testing Framework Design Document 1. Overview This document describes the architecture and implementation approach for a scalable automation framework using: Java Selenium WebDriver Cucumber BDD TestNG Allure Reporting REST Assured (API Testing) Appium (Mobile Testing) Maven Jenkins CI/CD Git/GitHub Extensible Page Object Model The framework supports: Web UI Automation API Automation Mobile Application Automation Parallel Execution Cross-browser Testing Environment Management Rich Reporting CI/CD Integration 2. Technology Stack Component Technology Programming Language Java 17 UI Automation Selenium WebDriver BDD Framework Cucumber Test Runner TestNG Reporting Allure Report API Automation REST Assured Mobile Automation Appium Build Tool Maven Logging Log4j2 Configuration Properties/YAML Dependency Injection PicoContainer Parallel Execution TestNG CI/CD Jenkins Version Control Git Assertion Library TestNG Assertions / AssertJ 3. Framework Capabilities Web Automation Supports: Chrome Firefox Edge Features: Page Object Model (POM) Explicit waits Screenshot capture Parallel execution Cross-browser support Reusable utilities API Automation Supports: GET POST PUT PATCH DELETE Validation: Status code verification Response body validation Schema validation Header validation JSON path assertions Libraries: REST Assured Jackson Gson Mobile Automation Using Appium: Android Native Apps Hybrid Apps Mobile Chrome Browser iOS Native Apps Hybrid Apps Safari Browser Capabilities: Gesture support Scroll Swipe Long press Screenshot capture Parallel execution 4. Framework Architecture wide 760 5. Design Pattern Page Object Model Separates: Locators Actions Assertions Benefits: Maintainability Reusability Reduced duplication Factory Pattern Responsible for: Browser initialization Driver creation Environment setup Supports: Chrome Firefox Edge Android Driver iOS Driver Singleton Pattern Used for: Driver Manager Config Reader Logger Builder Pattern Useful for: API request construction Test data generation 6. Driver Management Thread-safe implementation using ThreadLocal. wide 760 Supports: Parallel execution Multi-browser execution Grid execution 7. BDD Structure Feature File: wide 760 Step Definitions: wide 760 Hooks: wide 760 8. TestNG Integration Supports: Suite Execution wide 760 Features: Parallel execution Grouping Prioritization Retry mechanism Listeners 9. Allure Reporting Provides: Test Summary Pass/Fail Statistics Screenshots Attachments Timeline View Categories Execution Trends Attachments: Screenshots Request payload Response payload Logs Commands: wide 760 wide 760 10. API Layer Design BaseAPI Contains: Base URI Common headers Authentication Request Builder Responsible for: Headers Parameters Body Response Validator Validates: Status code Response body Schema Headers 11. Mobile Layer Design BaseMobileTest Responsible for: Driver initialization Device capabilities Supports: Android wide 760 iOS wide 760 12. Configuration Management Environment-specific files: wide 760 Contains: URLs Credentials Timeouts Browser information Accessed through: wide 760 13. Logging Using Log4j2. Logs include: Test execution API requests API responses Browser actions Exceptions Log Levels: INFO DEBUG WARN ERROR 14. Screenshot Management Capture screenshots: On failure On every step (optional) Storage: wide 760 Integrated with Allure reports. 15. Retry Mechanism Re-executes failed tests automatically. Example: wide 760 Capabilities: Retry count configurable Failure tracking 16. CI/CD Integration Jenkins Pipeline: wide 760 Supports: Nightly execution Trigger on commit Parallel pipelines 17. Maven Dependencies Main dependencies: Selenium wide 760 Cucumber wide 760 TestNG wide 760 REST Assured wide 760 Appium wide 760 Reporting wide 760 Logging wide 760 18. Parallel Execution Supported Levels: Scenario Level wide 760 Browser Level wide 760 Device Level wide 760 19. Future Enhancements Selenium Grid Distributed execution across nodes. Docker Containerized execution. Kubernetes Scalable execution environment. BrowserStack/Sauce Labs Cloud execution support. AI-Assisted Features Self-healing locators Automatic failure analysis Screenshot comparison Root cause analysis Test case generation using LLMs Autonomous agent execution 20. Recommended Framework Flow wide 760 Conclusion This framework provides a unified automation solution capable of executing: Web UI Tests API Tests Mobile Tests while maintaining: Reusability Scalability Maintainability Parallel execution Rich reporting CI/CD readiness Enterprise-grade architecture
